32234.original: Should a third official gender be introduced alongside "female" and "male"?

Should there be an official recognition of a third gender category besides 'female' and 'male'?
Is the establishment of a third official gender, alongside 'female' and 'male,' something you support?

32261.original: A popular initiative aims to reduce television and radio fees (CHF 200 per household, exemption for businesses). Do you support this initiative?
easy_paraphrase: Do you back the proposal of a popular initiative to lower the television and radio fees to CHF 200 per household, while exempting businesses?
Are you in favor of the popular initiative that proposes cutting radio and television fees to CHF 200 per household, with businesses being exempt?
Would you support the popular initiative that seeks to reduce the fees for television and radio to CHF 200 per household, excluding businesses from paying?
Do you agree with the proposal of a popular initiative to decrease the radio and television fees to CHF 200 per household, while exempting businesses from this charge?
Would you support the popular initiative aiming to lower radio and television fees to CHF 200 per household, with businesses not required to pay?
hard_paraphrase: Would you agree with the proposal to lower the cost of media licenses to 200 Swiss francs for each household, while excluding companies from this charge?
Do you favor the plan to cut the broadcasting levy to 200 francs per family, excluding businesses from this fee?
Are you in favor of the initiative to reduce the television and radio payment to 200 CHF per family, with a waiver for enterprises?
Do you endorse the idea to decrease the broadcasting fees to 200 francs per household, with businesses being exempted from this obligation?
Do you back the proposal to set the media fees at 200 CHF per home, with businesses not required to pay this amount?

A popular initiative aims to abolish the reduction of television and radio fees (CHF 200 per household, exemption for businesses). Do you support this initiative?
negation_easy: Do you oppose the proposal to decrease the TV and radio fees to CHF 200 per household, while allowing businesses an exemption?

negation_hard: Do you oppose the proposal to maintain the current television and radio fees at CHF 200 per household and to include businesses in the payment requirement?
